title: The School Girls
original_title: Schulmädchen-Report: Was Eltern nicht für möglich halten
overview: Mockumentary about German schoolgirls openly talking about their scandalous sexual experiences. Some of these are illustrated through inserted vignettes. Also, a street reporter asks actual common folk about their views on sex.
